summary: Completed full frontend testing of HumanFirewall dashboard. All 15 test scenarios passed successfully.

issues: Footer text color (text-slate-700) may be very low contrast against dark background — barely visible in screenshot

action_items: Minor: Consider increasing footer text contrast (currently text-slate-700 on slate-950 background)
critical_code_review_comments: Footer text uses text-slate-700 which has very low contrast against bg-slate-950 — accessibility concern
Toast component has no data-testid, making automated detection harder (found via text search instead)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. App is fully client-side React with no backend. Campaign simulation runs 12s, Accounting score increases by 9pts (68→77), toast fires correctly. Employee table shows 5 dept rows by default, 60 individual employees on toggle, search and sort work.

test_results.department_heatmap_5_cards: PASS - IT(32 green), Accounting(68 red), HR(52 amber), Sales(61 amber), Operations(48 amber)
test_results.toast_after_campaign: PASS - 'Accounting risk score increased — auto-training assigned.'
